params.name: Our Lady of Kazan
params.description:
On Aug 20, 1904, this national treasure of Russia was stolen and was almost destroyed.

The ancient statue of Our Lady of Kazan in St. Petersburg is the greatest icon of the Russian Orthodox Church. It represents Virgin Mary as the patron saint of Kazan City. In Russia, the replica of this statue is also highly respected among the Catholics. The statue of Our Lady of Kazan is regarded as the guardian of Russia and has existed for centuries.
